zh.of,Witering,Northampton,England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾
zh.Malitot Loges, Chanon, Normandy, France: 法國福朗-可特艾尤拉昌
zh.Saint-Sauveur-Le-Vicomte, Basse-Normandi: 法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維勒-維其特
zh.Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, France: 法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德布萊也
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Bigod於大約1053年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維勒-維其特時，她的父親Robert le Bigod40歲，母親Helene de Saint Sauveur32歲。她於大約1074年與Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye在英國英格蘭諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1085年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德布萊也享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Bigod于大约1053年出生在法国巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維勒-維其特时，她的父亲Robert le Bigod40岁，母亲Helene de Saint Sauveur32岁。她于大约1074年与Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye在英国英格兰諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1085年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德布萊也享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Bigod was born about 1053, in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Robert le Bigod, was 40 and her mother, Helene de Saint Sauveur, was 32. She married Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye about 1074, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1085, in Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Bigod est née environ 1053, à Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Robert le Bigod, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Helene de Saint Sauveur, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye environ 1074, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1085, à Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Bigod um 1053 in Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert le Bigod 40 und ihre Mutter Helene de Saint Sauveur 32. Sie hat um 1074 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1085 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Bigod è nata il circa 1053 nel Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert le Bigod, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Helene de Saint Sauveur, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye circa 1074, nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1085, nel Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Bigodが約1053年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-サウベウル-レ-ヴィコムトで生まれた時，父Robert le Bigodは40歳，母Helene de Saint Sauveurは32歳であった。約1074年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクでGeoffrey Ridel Baron of Blayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1085年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドブレイで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Bigod(이)가 대략 1053년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-소브우-레-빅트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert le Bigod(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helene de Saint Sauveur(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1074년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1085년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드 블레이에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Bigod nasceu aproximadamente 1053, em Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert le Bigod, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Helene de Saint Sauveur, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye aproximadamente 1074, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1085, em Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Bigod родилась около 1053 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур-ле-викомт, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert le Bigod было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Helene de Saint Sauveur, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye около 1074 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1085 г. в местности блеи, гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Bigod nació aproximadamente 1053, en Saint-Sauveur-le-Vicomte, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert le Bigod, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Helene de Saint Sauveur, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Geoffrey Ridel Baron of Blaye aproximadamente 1074, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1085, en Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 34 años.
